name: Litigation Practice
summary: Root skill for all litigation-related legal work including civil, criminal, and administrative proceedings.
content:
# Litigation Practice

This is the parent category for all litigation skills. Litigation involves representing clients in legal disputes through the court system.

## Sub-areas
- Commercial Litigation
- Personal Injury
- Employment Litigation
- Intellectual Property Litigation
- Family Law
- Criminal Defense
- Appeals
- Bankruptcy Litigation
- Class Actions
- Real Estate Litigation

## Key Principles
- Zealous advocacy within ethical bounds
- Thorough case investigation and discovery
- Strategic motion practice
- Effective negotiation and settlement evaluation
- Trial preparation and execution
